{{Item
| image = Guard suit.png
| id = guard_suit
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Guard Suit''' is a non-dyable equipable item that makes your dog look more trusty and stylish.

[[File:Guard suit display.png|frameless|606x606px]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| String <br>+ Black Wool<br> + White Wool
| [[File:Guard suit crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
